name: Form 1120 E-File Extension
description: Automated E-File Extension process for Form 1120 - 100% screenshot-based

steps.name: close_popup_if_present
steps.description: Close Add/Remove State popup if it appears

steps.name: click_efile_menu
steps.description: Click E-File in the top menu bar

steps.name: click_submit_electronic_filing
steps.description: Select Submit Electronic Filing Return in popup

steps.name: select_file_extension
steps.description: Select File Extension option (if not already selected)

steps.name: click_continue_filing
steps.description: Click Continue on Filing screen

steps.name: click_yes_federal_extension
steps.description: Click Yes for Federal Extension

steps.name: click_complete_form_7004
steps.description: Click Complete Form 7004 button

steps.name: click_continue_corporation_name
steps.description: Continue on Corporation Name screen

steps.name: check_homeowners_checkbox
steps.description: Ensure Homeowners Association checkbox is UNCHECKED - click to uncheck if checked

steps.name: click_continue_homeowners
steps.description: Continue on Homeowners screen

steps.name: click_continue_address
steps.description: Continue on Address screen

steps.name: click_continue_federal_id
steps.description: Continue on Federal ID Number screen

steps.name: click_continue_fiscal_year
steps.description: Continue on Fiscal Year screen

steps.name: click_continue_todays_date
steps.description: Continue on Today's Date screen

steps.name: check_no_office_checkbox
steps.description: Ensure 'No office or place of business in the United States' checkbox is UNCHECKED

steps.name: click_continue_no_office
steps.description: Continue on No Office screen

steps.name: check_section_checkbox
steps.description: Ensure Section 1.6081-5 checkbox is UNCHECKED

steps.name: click_continue_section
steps.description: Continue on Section screen

steps.name: scroll_tax_liability
steps.description: Scroll down in Tax Liability screen until Continue button is visible (scroll in screen center)

steps.name: click_continue_tax_liability
steps.description: Continue on Tax Liability screen (after scroll)

steps.name: click_continue_payment
steps.description: Continue on Payment Amount screen

steps.name: click_efile_form_7004
steps.description: Click E-File Form 7004 green button (Print Form 7004 screen)

steps.name: click_continue_acknowledgment
steps.description: Continue on Acknowledgment Status screen

steps.name: click_first_name_field
steps.description: Click First name field to ensure cursor position

steps.name: tab_to_title
steps.description: TAB 3x: First name -> Last name -> SSN -> Title

steps.name: fill_officer_title
steps.description: Fill Title if empty (uses clipboard check)

steps.name: tab_to_email
steps.description: TAB to Email field

steps.name: fill_officer_email
steps.description: Fill Email if empty

steps.name: tab_to_phone
steps.description: TAB to Phone field

steps.name: fill_officer_phone
steps.description: Fill Phone if empty

steps.name: click_continue_officer_info
steps.description: Continue on Signing Officer Information screen

steps.name: enter_officer_pin
steps.description: Enter Officer PIN (Officer's Signature screen)

steps.name: click_continue_pin
steps.description: Continue after PIN entry

steps.name: click_continue_ero_signature
steps.description: Continue on ERO Signature screen

steps.name: click_start_form_7004_alerts
steps.description: Click Start Form 7004 Alerts button (Federal E-File Alerts screen)

steps.name: handle_alerts_result
steps.description: Check if 'Passed Alerts' or 'Error/Omission' - different actions for each

if_false.description: Click Clients button to return to base (Error/Omission case)

steps.name: click_submit_efile
steps.description: Click Submit E-File button if visible (only after passed alerts)

steps.name: click_continue_green_confirmation
steps.description: Click GREEN Continue (NOT blue!) on confirmation screen

steps.name: click_new_return
steps.description: Click New Return button (Filing Complete screen)

steps.name: close_add_client_popup
steps.description: Close Add Client popup if present
